# AI Bulk Rename Images & Files

> A free, privacy-first browser-based tool to bulk rename images and files instantly — no uploads, no login, no installation required.

## What it does

Bulk rename images and files directly in your browser using the File System Access API. All operations are performed locally on your device; nothing is ever uploaded to a server.

## Supported rename rules

- Find & Replace (plain text or regex)
- Add Prefix / Suffix
- Change Case (uppercase, lowercase, title case)
- Sequence numbering (001, 002…)
- Change file extension

## Key facts

- 100% client-side — files never leave the device
- No login or account required
- Real-time preview before applying changes
- Drag-to-reorder rules for complex workflows
- Available in English, Chinese, and Russian
- Requires Chrome 123+ or Microsoft Edge 123+

## Links

- Homepage: https://ai-bulk-rename-images.com
- Privacy Policy: https://ai-bulk-rename-images.com/privacy
